content:
MODULE: cosmos.tools.security.edr
FILE: cosmos/tools/security/edr.py (639 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos EDR (Endpoint Detection and Response)

"Good news, everyone! I've built an endpoint protection system!"

Endpoint monitoring, threat detection, and response capabilities.

CLASSES:
- AlertSeverity(Enum): Alert severity levels.
- AlertType(Enum): Types of security alerts.
- ResponseAction(Enum): Automated response actions.
- SecurityAlert: Security alert from EDR.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DetectionRule: EDR detection rule.
- EndpointStatus: Current endpoint security status.
- EDREngine: Endpoint Detection and Response Engine.

Capabilities:
- Real-time process monit
  Methods: def add_rule(self, rule: DetectionRule)
  Methods: def remove_rule(self, rule_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def create_alert(self, alert_type: AlertType, severity: AlertSeverity, title: str, description: str,
  Methods: def register_alert_callback(self, callback: Callable[[SecurityAlert], None])
  Methods: def process_event(self, event: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[SecurityAlert]
  Methods: def quarantine_file(self, file_path: str, reason: str='') -> bool
  Methods: async def start_monitoring(self)
  Methods: def stop_monitoring(self)
